title: Path traversal in file download endpoint
author: contributor
pr_description: Adds file download endpoint for user uploads.
diff:
--- a/files.py
+++ b/files.py
@@ -7,6 +7,12 @@ import os
 
 UPLOAD_DIR = '/var/uploads'
 
+def download_file(filename):
+    filepath = os.path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, filename)
+    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
+        return f.read()

gold_issues.description: Path traversal: unsanitized filename allows reading arbitrary files (e.g. ../../etc/passwd).
